data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Both scopes landed + CI-green: (1) verify per-call max_tokens scales with finding count (unit-tested + mutation-checked), (2) adapter maps non-PASS+0-findings+no-gap to 'indeterminate' coverage-gap not 'finding'. Sole unmet criterion is AC3's LIVE re-run demonstration on the specific historical ~26-finding auto-deploy v3 plan (verify_failed=false) — a billable runtime demonstration requiring that exact reproducer, not achievable offline; the equivalent live evidence (REBAR_LLM_MAX_TOKENS=64000 -> verify completes, indeterminate=0) is already captured in sole-teal-churn's comment. Closing uncertified by design.". Session: 2bae0ea3d.
